name: Slug Street Scrappers
overview: Slug Street Scrappers is a funny martial arts TV show inspired by the fighting video game genre of the early nineties (e.g. Streets of Rage, Mortal Kombat, Street Fighter, Double Dragon), as well as Japanese Anime. The series employs an over-arching storyline and showcases unique martial arts styles from around the world, including Kickboxing, Karate, Muay Thai, Taekwondo, Boxing, Kung Fu and more.
